completion_rule: The scope is complete only when all ordered layers have real Linux-x64 implementation, stable diagnostics, documentation, examples, smoke/stress/fuzz evidence, strict validators, release-gate evidence from a clean snapshot, and a completion audit mapping every requirement to concrete artifacts.
